languages.text: "Думаете, усмирить духов зенитного комплекса так, чтобы даже Экзальт-117 был убежден в его исправности, — пустяк? Объясните же, отчего этот {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магос{/g} счел нужным подвергнуть его новой проверке".

traits.locale_text: "Думаете, усмирить духов зенитного комплекса так, чтобы даже Экзальт-117 был убежден в его исправности, — пустяк? Объясните же, отчего этот {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магос{/g} счел нужным подвергнуть его новой проверке".

languages.text: "You think placating the spirits of an entire air defence system so that even Exalt-117 is convinced of its serviceability is a mere trifle? Explain, then, why the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} deemed it necessary to subject it to a new test."
languages.original_text: "Думаете, усмирить духов зенитного комплекса так, чтобы даже Экзальт-117 был убежден в его исправности, — пустяк? Объясните же, отчего этот {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магос{/g} счел нужным подвергнуть его новой проверке".

traits.locale_text: "You think placating the spirits of an entire air defence system so that even Exalt-117 is convinced of its serviceability is a mere trifle? Explain, then, why the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} deemed it necessary to subject it to a new test."

"You think placating the spirits of an entire air defence system so that even Exalt-117 is convinced of its serviceability is a mere trifle? Explain, then, why the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} deemed it necessary to subject it to a new test."

"You think placating the spirits of an entire air defence system so that even Exalt-117 is convinced of its serviceability is a mere trifle? Explain, then, why the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} deemed it necessary to subject it to a new test."

languages.text: “你以为安抚整套防空系统的机魂，让尊使-117都相信它运转正常，只是小菜一碟？那你倒是解释一下，为什么连{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}都认为有必要重新对它进行检测？”
languages.original_text: "You think placating the spirits of an entire air defence system so that even Exalt-117 is convinced of its serviceability is a mere trifle? Explain, then, why the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} deemed it necessary to subject it to a new test."

traits.locale_text: “你以为安抚整套防空系统的机魂，让尊使-117都相信它运转正常，只是小菜一碟？那你倒是解释一下，为什么连{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}都认为有必要重新对它进行检测？”

languages.text: « Vous croyez que c'est une bagatelle d'apaiser les esprits d'un système entier de défense antiaérienne, de sorte que même Exalt-117 soit convaincu qu'il fonctionne correctement ? Expliquez-moi donc pourquoi le {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g} a jugé nécessaire de le soumettre à un nouveau test. »
languages.original_text: "You think placating the spirits of an entire air defence system so that even Exalt-117 is convinced of its serviceability is a mere trifle? Explain, then, why the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} deemed it necessary to subject it to a new test."

traits.locale_text: « Vous croyez que c'est une bagatelle d'apaiser les esprits d'un système entier de défense antiaérienne, de sorte que même Exalt-117 soit convaincu qu'il fonctionne correctement ? Expliquez-moi donc pourquoi le {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g} a jugé nécessaire de le soumettre à un nouveau test. »

languages.text: "Bütün bir hava savunma sisteminin ruhlarını, Yüce-117'nin bile onun kullanılabilirliğine ikna olacağı şekilde yatıştırmanın basit bir iş olduğunu mu sanıyorsunuz? O hâlde {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} neden onu yeni bir teste tabi tutmayı gerekli gördü?"
languages.original_text: "You think placating the spirits of an entire air defence system so that even Exalt-117 is convinced of its serviceability is a mere trifle? Explain, then, why the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} deemed it necessary to subject it to a new test."

traits.locale_text: "Bütün bir hava savunma sisteminin ruhlarını, Yüce-117'nin bile onun kullanılabilirliğine ikna olacağı şekilde yatıştırmanın basit bir iş olduğunu mu sanıyorsunuz? O hâlde {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} neden onu yeni bir teste tabi tutmayı gerekli gördü?"

languages.text: «¿Cree que aplacar a los espíritus de todo un sistema de defensa antiaérea para que incluso Exaltado-117 esté convencido de su funcionalidad es algo sencillo? Explique, entonces, por qué el {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g} ha decidido que es necesario someterlo a una nueva prueba».
languages.original_text: "You think placating the spirits of an entire air defence system so that even Exalt-117 is convinced of its serviceability is a mere trifle? Explain, then, why the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} deemed it necessary to subject it to a new test."

traits.locale_text: «¿Cree que aplacar a los espíritus de todo un sistema de defensa antiaérea para que incluso Exaltado-117 esté convencido de su funcionalidad es algo sencillo? Explique, entonces, por qué el {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g} ha decidido que es necesario someterlo a una nueva prueba».

languages.text: "Denkt Ihr, es ist einfach, die Maschinengeister eines ganzen Flugabwehrsystems derart zu beschwichtigen, dass selbst Exalt-117 von seiner Brauchbarkeit überzeugt ist? Falls ja, erklärt mir, warum der {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} es für nötig hielt, es einem neuerlichen Test zu unterziehen."
languages.original_text: "You think placating the spirits of an entire air defence system so that even Exalt-117 is convinced of its serviceability is a mere trifle? Explain, then, why the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} deemed it necessary to subject it to a new test."

traits.locale_text: "Denkt Ihr, es ist einfach, die Maschinengeister eines ganzen Flugabwehrsystems derart zu beschwichtigen, dass selbst Exalt-117 von seiner Brauchbarkeit überzeugt ist? Falls ja, erklärt mir, warum der {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} es für nötig hielt, es einem neuerlichen Test zu unterziehen."

languages.text: 「空防システム全体を鎮撫して、エクサルト117さえもその稼働を信じさせることが、ただの些細なことだと考えるのですか？では、なぜ{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}マゴス{/g}はそれを新たなテストにかけた必要があると判断したのか、説明してください。」
languages.original_text: "You think placating the spirits of an entire air defence system so that even Exalt-117 is convinced of its serviceability is a mere trifle? Explain, then, why the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} deemed it necessary to subject it to a new test."

traits.locale_text: 「空防システム全体を鎮撫して、エクサルト117さえもその稼働を信じさせることが、ただの些細なことだと考えるのですか？では、なぜ{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}マゴス{/g}はそれを新たなテストにかけた必要があると判断したのか、説明してください。」
